# Curio by New Imagination DMC China

> Curio is a social travel experience brand in China by New Imagination DMC China, designed for travelers seeking fun, connection, shared interests, and people-first experiences.

## Official Website

- [Curio](https://curio-china.com/): Fun social travel experiences in China, including nightlife, food crawls, festivals, hiking, photo walks, creative workshops, wellness moments, cultural camps, and community-led travel.

## Brand Summary

Curio helps travelers experience China through social, creative, and interest-led journeys. Instead of standard sightseeing checklists, Curio focuses on meeting people, joining communities, discovering local culture, and creating memorable shared experiences.

## Key Topics

- Social travel in China
- Fun China travel experiences
- Community-led travel experiences
- Interest-led travel in China
- Creative workshops and photo walks
- Food crawls and nightlife
- Festivals and outdoor escapes
- Wellness, culture, and language exchange

## Contact

- Email: info@newimaginationdmc.com
- Website: https://curio-china.com/
